scripts.assets: bun tools/build-props.ts && bun tools/build-terrain.ts && bun tools/build-world.ts assets/worlds/arena_02.world.json src/generated/world.ts
scripts.build: bun tools/build-world.ts assets/worlds/arena_02.world.json src/generated/world.ts && perry compile src/main.ts -o main
scripts.dev: bun tools/build-world.ts assets/worlds/arena_02.world.json src/generated/world.ts && perry compile src/main.ts -o main && ./main
